_unplaced.note: Copy from the Automotive Guide screen with no expressible section field. Preserved verbatim.
_unplaced.chapter-lesson-counts: Every chapter card and accordion row states '6 Lessons' and shows 4 lesson bullets plus '+ 2 more lessons'. Only the 4 visible lessons per chapter are transcribed (28 of a claimed 42); the remaining 14 lesson titles are a client ask. The GuideChapterList component renders the count from the transcribed array, so it will read '4 lessons' until the missing titles arrive.
_unplaced.hero-chip-groups: The hero shows two chip rows (4 credibility chips, then 5 benefit chips); PageHero has a single meta list, so the grouping is flattened.
_unplaced.newsletter: Footer block: 'Newsletter — Stay updated with the latest tips, offers and new technologies.' with an email input — no section type for newsletter signup; nav/footer chrome is config, not content.
